name: Anthony Towns
cooked: Presumably that only works if you have N anonymity groups, but only need to connect to rN groups, with r < 1 (and you need a code to achieve that)? Then you need to DoS every node in (1-r)N+1 groups instead of just 1 group; though in either case you also need to DoS all the remaining full archival nodes as well, assuming there are any.
topic_title: Fountain Codes: a way to reduce blockchain storage costs
topic_html_title: Fountain Codes: a way to reduce blockchain storage costs
raw: Presumably that only works if you have N anonymity groups, but only need to connect to $rN$ groups, with $r < 1$ (and you need a code to achieve that)? Then you need to DoS every node in $(1-r)N+1$ groups instead of just 1 group; though in either case you also need to DoS all the remaining full archival nodes as well, assuming there are any.
